# `postmortem` tools

## `postmortem.crash`

`partial` · `read-only`

Run a crash command batch over a Run's captured core; returns redacted output.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `commands` | `array` | yes | Crash commands to run (allowlisted read-only verbs). |
| `run_id` | `string` | yes | The Run whose captured core to analyze. |

## `postmortem.triage`

`partial` · `read-only`

Run the fixed triage commands (log+bt) over a Run's captured core; redacted report.

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `run_id` | `string` | yes | The Run whose captured core to triage. |
